title: useDocumentVisibility hook to pause animations when tab is hidden
scenario_context: App with animations or polling. Pause when tab hidden to save battery/CPU.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Page Visibility API tells us tab state.\n2. Pause/resume on visibility change.\n3. Saves battery on mobile especially.
accessibility_across_viewports: N/A — performance concern.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Background tabs continue heavy work — drain battery.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Universal pattern. 2) Single listener. 3) Battery/CPU savings.

title: Card that swaps between media-first and content-first orientations
viewport_spectrum: Cards with image + text in various containers
scenario_context: News card. Default: image top, content below. Wide: image left, content right. Container-driven.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Wide container fits side-by-side.\n2. Narrow stacks.\n3. CSS Grid order.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real article. Image alt empty (decorative if title carries meaning).
what_breaks_naive_approach: Viewport queries treat narrow desktop sidebars same as mobile.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Container-aware. 2) Aspect-ratio swap. 3) Single component.

title: Quote/blockquote with adaptive font size and decorative element scaling
scenario_context: Pull quote with large opening quotation mark. Quote size and mark scale together via clamp.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Fixed quotation mark size disproportionate at fluid quote size
responsive_reasoning: 1. Quote and mark scale together.\n2. Mark is em-based (relative to quote).\n3. Centered positioning.
accessibility_across_viewports: Semantic blockquote/cite. Decorative quote mark aria-hidden.
edge_cases_handled: Narrow viewport — smaller font, smaller mark proportionally
what_breaks_naive_approach: Fixed sizes look wrong at extremes.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Quote and decoration proportional. 2) em-based mark scaling. 3) Semantic markup.

title: Gallery grid with consistent gap regardless of column count via gap+aspect-ratio
scenario_context: Photo grid. Gap stays consistent visually regardless of column count (1, 3, 5, 7).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Fixed columns with sparse gaps at extremes
responsive_reasoning: 1. Gap independent of column count.\n2. aspect-ratio for image consistency.\n3. auto-fit handles columns.
accessibility_across_viewports: ul/li for screen readers. Alt text.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Gap that scales with viewport creates inconsistent spacing.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Fixed gap, variable columns. 2) Aspect-ratio cells. 3) Lazy loading.

title: Slider thumb with adaptive size and accessible label always visible
scenario_context: Range slider with current value always shown above thumb. Mobile: larger thumb + value tooltip. Desktop: smaller thumb + inline label.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native range styled differently per pointer.\n2. Current value live region.\n3. Always visible value.
accessibility_across_viewports: Live region updates value. Native keyboard. Labels.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Tiny thumb on mobile mis-tap risk.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Pointer-aware thumb. 2) Live region. 3) Native a11y.

title: Search results that re-position when keyboard appears so first result is visible
scenario_context: Search bar with dropdown results below. Keyboard appears — first result should remain visible above keyboard.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Results dropdown positioned relative to search input.\n2. Position calc accounts for keyboard inset.\n3. Max height to fit visible area.
accessibility_across_viewports: role=listbox/option. ARIA combobox pattern (full version in production).
edge_cases_handled: Keyboard appears — dropdown height capped to fit visible
Tap result — input updates, dropdown closes
Blur — short delay so click registers first
what_breaks_naive_approach: Dropdown going off-screen makes results invisible.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Keyboard-aware max-height. 2) Always-visible first results. 3) Internal scroll for more.

title: PWA install banner that appears in safe area with proper dismissal
scenario_context: App suggests 'Add to home screen'. Banner at top must respect notch and be dismissible. Persistent dismissal via localStorage.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Banner respects top safe area.\n2. Dismiss persists for session/forever.\n3. iOS-specific install detection (beforeinstallprompt is Chrome only).

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Tap 'Install' triggers prompt; tap X dismisses

performance_notes: Renders only when eligible. localStorage check on mount.
accessibility_across_viewports: role=region with aria-label. Dismiss button aria-label.
edge_cases_handled: iOS Safari — no beforeinstallprompt, but PWA installable manually (could show iOS-specific instructions)
what_breaks_naive_approach: No safe area = banner under notch. No dismissal persistence = annoying.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Safe area aware. 2) Persistent dismissal. 3) Native install prompt integration.

title: Game UI that locks to landscape on phones but works in any on tablets
scenario_context: Web game. Phone portrait: 'Rotate to landscape' message. Tablet: works in any orientation. Use screen.orientation.lock if available + CSS hint.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Some games need landscape (driving, racing).\n2. iOS doesn't allow programmatic lock — show hint instead.\n3. Tablet usually has room in any orientation.

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Portrait phone — rotate hint. Landscape phone — game.

accessibility_across_viewports: Message text accessible. Game content has game-specific a11y.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Forcing landscape via JS lock on iOS doesn't work — must guide user.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) CSS-only hint. 2) Tablet works either way. 3) Universal pattern.

title: Adaptive zoom + pan for image inspection: tap to fit/fill, pinch on touch
scenario_context: Inspect zoomable image. Touch: pinch zoom + pan. Mouse: wheel zoom + drag pan. Tap to toggle fit/fill.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Different interaction per device that confuses
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native zoom uses transform.\n2. Touch pinch via PointerEvent + 2-finger tracking.\n3. Mouse wheel zoom.

detection_strategy.code_pattern: let touches = new Map(); if (touches.size === 2) handlePinch();

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Pinch to zoom, drag to pan, double-tap to fit/fill
interaction_model_per_device.desktop_mouse: Wheel zoom, drag pan, double-click fit/fill

performance_notes: transform GPU. Library recommended for production (e.g., react-zoom-pan-pinch).
accessibility_across_viewports: alt text. Keyboard zoom (production +/- shortcuts).
what_breaks_naive_approach: No zoom = images can't be inspected. Different patterns per device = confusing.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Touch + mouse unified. 2) Double-tap toggle. 3) Smooth transforms.

title: Spotify-style three-pane layout with library, queue, and now-playing
scenario_context: Library left, now-playing center, queue right. Mobile: queue accessible via button. Desktop: all three visible.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Three panes natural on desktop.\n2. Queue is supplemental — drawer on mobile.\n3. Now-playing always primary.

layout_strategy.primary_technique: Three pane → two pane → one pane progression

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Now-playing primary. Tap queue button → drawer.

accessibility_across_viewports: Landmarks (aside, main). aria-labels on buttons.
edge_cases_handled: Mobile — both library and queue accessible via header buttons
what_breaks_naive_approach: Cramming three panes on mobile = unusable.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Asymmetric progressive collapse. 2) Now-playing always primary. 3) Same data.

title: Real-time updating table: highlights changed rows briefly without scroll jump
scenario_context: Stock price table updates in real-time. Changed rows briefly highlight. Don't auto-scroll (user may be reading).
responsive_reasoning: 1. Updates preserve scroll position.\n2. Visual highlight (color flash) on change.\n3. ARIA live region for accessibility.

detection_strategy.code_pattern: useEffect on value change → temporarily add 'flash' class

interaction_model_per_device.desktop_keyboard: Tab through rows; live region for SR

performance_notes: Map for O(1) diff. setTimeout for flash duration.
accessibility_across_viewports: Add aria-live=polite on table or specific changed cells for SR announcements.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Auto-scroll loses user position. No flash means silent updates.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Scroll preserved. 2) Visual change indicator. 3) Performance-aware diff.

title: Multi-select with chips that flow naturally across viewports
scenario_context: Multi-select for tags. Selected items as chips. Chips wrap across rows. Input field for adding more.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Chips flex-wrap.\n2. Touch-friendly remove buttons.\n3. Input field adapts within available space.

interaction_model_per_device.desktop_keyboard: Tab to chip, Delete to remove

accessibility_across_viewports: Remove buttons have aria-label. Backspace removes last (keyboard convenience).
edge_cases_handled: Many chips — wrap to multiple rows
Long tag name — wraps within chip
what_breaks_naive_approach: Single line chips overflow. No keyboard removal frustrates power users.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Flex-wrap natural. 2) Touch-friendly remove. 3) Backspace keyboard shortcut.

title: Video aspect-ratio preservation with object-fit fallbacks
viewport_spectrum: Video in containers of varied aspects
scenario_context: Embedded video in container. Aspect mismatch — use object-fit. 16:9 video in 1:1 container letterboxes top/bottom.
responsive_reasoning: 1. object-fit: contain preserves aspect with letterbox.\n2. object-fit: cover crops.\n3. Choice depends on context.
accessibility_across_viewports: Native controls.
edge_cases_handled: Wide video in narrow container — letterbox
what_breaks_naive_approach: No object-fit stretches video.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) object-fit options. 2) Aspect preserved. 3) Container-agnostic.

title: Breadcrumb that becomes back button only on mobile
scenario_context: Settings page with breadcrumb 'Home > Settings > Account > Privacy'. Mobile: just shows '← Account' (back). Desktop: full breadcrumb.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Breadcrumb on mobile is too wide.\n2. Back to parent is sufficient context.\n3. Full breadcrumb on desktop for clarity.
accessibility_across_viewports: nav with aria-label. aria-current=page. Mobile back has clear parent label.
edge_cases_handled: Top level — no parent, no back button
Deep — full path on desktop, parent only on mobile
what_breaks_naive_approach: Full breadcrumb on mobile wraps to 3 lines.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Mobile back vs desktop breadcrumb. 2) Same data. 3) Always know parent.

title: Nested modal handling: modal inside modal stacks correctly
scenario_context: Modal A opens, user clicks a button → Modal B opens on top. Stack management for focus, escape, backdrop.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Both modals close on backdrop click (only top should)
responsive_reasoning: 1. Stack tracks modal order.\n2. Escape closes top only.\n3. Focus restores in reverse order.
accessibility_across_viewports: Top modal trapped focus; lower modals inert.
edge_cases_handled: Focus returns to previous modal on close
what_breaks_naive_approach: Each modal listening to Escape closes wrong modal.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Stack-aware handlers. 2) Predictable behavior. 3) Universal pattern.

title: Print stylesheet that produces clean printable pages from web app
scenario_context: User prints page. Hide nav, ads, buttons. Adjust typography for paper. Page breaks intelligent.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Page breaks in middle of headings
responsive_reasoning: 1. Print is another viewport.\n2. @media print scopes overrides.\n3. Page break controls (avoid, after).
accessibility_across_viewports: Content readable in print. URLs visible.
edge_cases_handled: Links — URL appended for paper readers
what_breaks_naive_approach: Default print includes navigation, sidebars, buttons.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Print is a real viewport. 2) Content-focused. 3) Reader-friendly URL inclusion.

title: Hook that throttles fast resize events to single fire
scenario_context: Resize causes many events. Throttle to last value after settle to avoid mid-resize calculations.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Resize fires many events.\n2. Debounce trailing edge.\n3. Final value after settle.
accessibility_across_viewports: N/A
edge_cases_handled: Continuous resize — only final value sets state
Rotation — single state update after orientation settles
what_breaks_naive_approach: Per-event setState causes 60+ renders during drag.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Single state update per settle. 2) Universal pattern. 3) Configurable delay.

title: Status badge that shows icon only or icon+label based on container
scenario_context: Order status badge. Wide context: 'Shipped (✓)'. Narrow: just '✓' icon with tooltip.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Status compact when room limited.\n2. Icon carries meaning.\n3. Tooltip preserves full info.

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Title for tooltip on hover (limited on touch)

accessibility_across_viewports: aria-label always present (regardless of visual label). title for hover.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Truncating label leaves meaning unclear.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Progressive disclosure. 2) aria-label always. 3) Icon carries meaning.

title: Multi-language typography: handling languages that need different font sizes
scenario_context: App supports English, Arabic, Japanese, Chinese. Each language needs different base font size for legibility. CJK chars need larger sizes; Arabic similar.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Same font size for all languages
responsive_reasoning: 1. Different languages need different sizes.\n2. lang attribute on html.\n3. CSS targets via :lang().
accessibility_across_viewports: lang attribute critical for screen readers (pronunciation).
edge_cases_handled: Mixed language pages — lang on specific elements
what_breaks_naive_approach: Same font sizing makes CJK feel cramped, Arabic less legible.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Language-aware sizing. 2) Proper font stacks. 3) RTL support.

title: Layout grid system: 12-column with adaptive gutters and margins
scenario_context: Classic 12-column grid system. Gutters between columns scale with viewport. Margins on edges scale.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Standard 12-column grid.\n2. Gutter and margin via clamp.\n3. CSS Grid implementation.
accessibility_across_viewports: DOM order respected.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Float-based grids are obsolete and fragile. Fixed pixel gutters look wrong at extremes.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Standard 12-col model. 2) Fluid gutters. 3) Native Grid.

title: Cursor changes that gracefully degrade on touch devices
scenario_context: Custom cursors (grab, zoom-in, help) work on mouse but mean nothing on touch. Use pointer media query to skip on touch.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Custom cursors that have no purpose on touch
Cursor: pointer on every clickable (touch sees nothing)
responsive_reasoning: 1. Cursors are visual hints for mouse users.\n2. Touch ignores cursor.\n3. No harm but pointer:fine gates for clarity.

layout_strategy.primary_technique: Cursor hints for precise pointer only

interaction_model_per_device.tablet: Trackpad: cursor active. Touch only: none.

accessibility_across_viewports: Cursors don't affect a11y; just visual hint.
edge_cases_handled: Hybrid devices — cursor visible when trackpad attached
Pure touch — no cursor changes (no effect anyway)
what_breaks_naive_approach: Naive use isn't harmful, just unnecessary specificity. Best practice = pointer:fine gate.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Pointer-aware cursor affordances. 2) Hybrid device compatibility. 3) Universal pattern.

title: Composer that prevents body scroll lock while keyboard summoned to allow scroll inside
scenario_context: Composer modal with long content. Body usually scroll-locked. But composer itself needs to scroll internally. Allow internal scroll.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: overflow:hidden on body breaks composer scroll
No scroll lock = background scrolls behind modal
responsive_reasoning: 1. Body scroll lock prevents background scroll.\n2. Composer's own scroll container excluded.\n3. overscroll-behavior: contain isolates.
accessibility_across_viewports: Scroll trap within composer. Body unscrollable while composer open.
edge_cases_handled: User scrolls to top of composer — doesn't bleed to body
what_breaks_naive_approach: Setting body overflow:hidden but composer doesn't have overscroll-behavior — scroll bleeds.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) overscroll-behavior contains. 2) Body locked. 3) Composer scrollable.

title: Tab bar that shows blur effect behind content with safe area on iOS
scenario_context: iOS-style translucent tab bar at bottom. Backdrop-blur with content showing through. Respects home indicator.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Translucent bar with backdrop-filter.\n2. @supports fallback for older browsers.\n3. Safe area for home indicator.
performance_notes: backdrop-filter is GPU-accelerated. @supports fallback to opaque.
accessibility_across_viewports: Per responsive-007 a11y.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Opaque bar loses iOS feel. No fallback breaks older browsers.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Feature detection. 2) Safe area. 3) iOS-native aesthetic.

title: Whiteboard canvas that scales contents proportionally on rotation
scenario_context: Whiteboard with drawings. Rotation changes available canvas dimensions. Drawings should scale proportionally to maintain visibility.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Compute scale factor from old/new dimensions.\n2. Apply to all drawing coordinates.\n3. ResizeObserver triggers.

layout_strategy.primary_technique: Drawing coords stored in normalized space + scaled to canvas

performance_notes: Coords normalized — single redraw on resize. Canvas redraws aren't expensive at moderate stroke counts.
accessibility_across_viewports: Canvas role=img + descriptive label.
edge_cases_handled: Phone rotation — strokes scale to new aspect
what_breaks_naive_approach: Storing absolute pixel coords means strokes don't scale.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Normalized coordinates. 2) Resize-aware redraw. 3) Aspect-preserving.

title: Reading-mode toggle for iPad that becomes book-spread in landscape
scenario_context: E-reader. Portrait: single page. Landscape: two-page spread (book metaphor) with center binding.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Book metaphor in landscape on tablets.\n2. Single page portrait.\n3. Same content paginates differently.
accessibility_across_viewports: Reading order preserved.
edge_cases_handled: Center binding rule visible in spread
what_breaks_naive_approach: Single page landscape iPad wastes 50% screen.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Book metaphor. 2) Orientation-driven. 3) Reading order preserved.

title: Discord-style server list + channels + chat + member sidebar
scenario_context: Discord layout: servers icon column, channels list, chat, members sidebar. Each can hide independently on smaller viewports.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Chat is primary.\n2. Others surface on demand.\n3. Asymmetric collapse.

layout_strategy.information_density_changes: Drops members first, then servers, then channels

accessibility_across_viewports: Each pane has appropriate landmark.
what_breaks_naive_approach: 4 panes on tablet = unusable column widths.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Asymmetric collapse priority. 2) Same data. 3) Chat always primary.

title: Table that adapts to content length per row (variable height)
scenario_context: Email subject can be short or long. Rows should adapt height — no truncate by default. But virtualization needs row height knowledge.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Content drives height.\n2. For virtualization, dynamic row height libraries (TanStack Virtual).\n3. Min height for tap targets.
performance_notes: Natural flex height. Virtualize for >100 rows.
accessibility_across_viewports: Real list items. Button per row. 44pt min.
edge_cases_handled: Min height enforced for tap target
what_breaks_naive_approach: Truncating loses information. Fixed height cramped on multi-line subjects.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Content-driven height. 2) Min-height for tap. 3) line-clamp preserves info.

title: Time picker that uses native time input on mobile and custom dropdown on desktop
scenario_context: Time input. Mobile: native time picker. Desktop: custom dropdown with 15-min increments for quick selection.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Custom picker on mobile (worse than native)
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native time picker great on mobile.\n2. Desktop benefits from quick-pick dropdown.\n3. Same time value.

interaction_model_per_device.desktop_keyboard: Tab to select; type to filter

performance_notes: Native input mobile. Desktop list small.
accessibility_across_viewports: Native time input fully accessible. Desktop dropdown is button-based.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Custom mobile picker worse than native.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Native + custom. 2) 15-min quick picks. 3) Same value.

title: Hero image with focal point preserved across crops
scenario_context: Hero image with subject (e.g., face) at specific point. Different crops per viewport should keep face visible — use object-position based on focal point.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Image has subject at known position.\n2. object-position drives crop center.\n3. Per-image config.
accessibility_across_viewports: alt text describes scene.
edge_cases_handled: Tall image in wide crop — top focal point preserved
Wide image in tall crop — center focal
Different aspect per viewport — same focal
CMS could store focal per image
what_breaks_naive_approach: Center crop always loses subjects positioned off-center.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Focal point per image. 2) object-position. 3) Subject preserved across crops.

title: Wizard/onboarding flow with progress that adapts per viewport
scenario_context: Multi-step onboarding. Desktop: stepper at top with all steps named. Mobile: 'Step 2 of 5' + progress bar.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Mobile abstracts to count + bar.\n2. Desktop shows full stepper.\n3. Per responsive-027 pattern.
accessibility_across_viewports: role=progressbar with aria-value*.
edge_cases_handled: Desktop — could show full stepper above (composition)
what_breaks_naive_approach: Just '40%' without context is unclear.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Progress meaningful at any size. 2) ARIA progressbar. 3) Step label + count.
